name: vibe-coding-guardrails
description: AI coding guardrails that keep changes surgical, require evidence, and block unsafe work.

interface.shortDescription: AI coding guardrails for safe, evidence-backed changes.
interface.longDescription: Use lightweight skills for everyday coding behavior or initialize a closed-loop harness with hooks, Git hooks, CI gates, gate artifacts, approvals, and docs drift checks.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibe Coding Guardrails core rules for this change.
Use Vibe Coding Guardrails to initialize this repository.
Use Vibe Coding Guardrails to review this diff before commit.
